name: Carl Spaatz
longDesc: Carl Spaatz commande la 8e Air Force en Europe puis les forces aériennes stratégiques sur le Japon, signant la reddition japonaise à Tokyo Bay. Carte WC4 aérienne tier-S or : bonus bombardier stratégique maximal, à utiliser sur Ploesti et les raids sur l'Allemagne.

skills.name: Air Superiority
skills.desc: 60% chance to ignore anti-air weapon when commanding air force. Damage +20% with Stealth Aircraft and B-52 Stratofortress.

skills.name: Explosives
skills.desc: Damage +16% when attacking the stronghold units

skills.name: Carpet Bombing
skills.desc: Damage +24% to the defending forces in the city when air-raiding

skills.name: Airforce Leader
skills.desc: 16% chance to give the enemy a critical attack when commanding air units

skills.name: Industrial Expert
skills.desc: The industrial output of the city +4

sources: Données extraites des fichiers de jeu World Conqueror 4
shortDescEn: Gold air force general — United States.
longDescEn: Carl Spaatz commanded US 8th Air Force in Europe and then strategic air forces over Japan, co-signing the surrender in Tokyo Bay. A WC4 tier-S gold air-force card with maximum strategic-bomber bonuses — shine him on Ploesti and the strategic raids over Germany.
longDescDe: Carl Spaatz führte die 8. US-Luftflotte in Europa und dann die strategischen Luftstreitkräfte über Japan, wo er in der Bucht von Tokio die Kapitulation mitunterzeichnete. Im WC4 eine S-Klasse-Gold-Luftwaffenkarte mit maximalen Strategiebomber-Boni — stark bei Ploiești und den strategischen Angriffen auf Deutschland.
